news.t: Clough Capital's Actively Managed ETF Platform Surpasses $100 Million in Assets Under Management
Clough Capital Marks Five Year Anniversary of Actively Managed ETFs
Clough Capital Celebrates Three-Year Anniversary of Clough Long/Short Equity ETF and Clough Select Equity ETF
Clough Capital Assumes Management of Changebridge Capital's Active ETFs
Changebridge ETFs Reach Two Year Milestone
Changebridge Capital Launches Two Actively Managed ESG ETFs

holdings.infoBox: CBLS is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash stock at 38.40%, Starbucks at 3.27%, Service Corporation International at 3.24%, Nebius Group at 3.23%, and Oscar Health at 3.18%.

overview.description: The Clough Hedged Equity ETF (CBLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an alternative strategy that takes both long and short position in US-listed stocks based on the adviser's multi-year outlook. The actively managed fund will typically be 30%-70% net long exposure. CBLS was launched on Nov 13, 2020 and is issued by Clough.
